_source: Vercel Geist design system (vercel.com/geist) + Geist fonts, scraped 2026-07-18. Full raw scales in geist-tokens-raw.json.
_doctrine: Flat color, no gradients. Numbered scales with fixed roles: 100-400 surfaces, 500-600 borders, 700 brand, 800-1000 text. Elevation = one hairline border + progressively layered soft shadows, never a harsh drop shadow. Ship light and dark as first-class. House rule: avoid blue and purple as the brand accent; velofy uses amber.

fonts.sans: 'Geist', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace
fonts.self_host_note: For self-contained pages, download the woff2 and @font-face them. Geist Pixel is display-only (headlines, wordmarks); never body.

_avoid._why: house rule: no blue/purple brand accent (reads as cold-AI default)

velofy_flat._note: The velofy stack palette derived from Geist: neutral grays + one amber accent, flat, gradient-free.

type_scale._note: px size / line-height / letter-spacing. Headings are semibold with tight negative tracking; copy is normal with 0 tracking.
